title: Crispy Pork Belly with Earthy Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and tender pork belly dish with a crispy exterior, served with a savory earthy stir fry. Ideal for dinner or a special occasion.
instructions: Rub the pork belly with salt, black pepper, and olive oil, then wrap it in foil and bake for 2 hours.
Let the pork belly rest for 10 minutes before slicing it into thick pieces.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat and sauté the sliced onion until it's caramelized.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the chopped spinach and cook until wilted.
Slice the pork belly and serve it with the earthy stir fry.
Garnish with crusty bread for a crispy and satisfying meal.
